dashboard.heroSubtitle: Upload your resume and let AI guide your job search

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your local workspace, onboarding preferences, and system diagnostics.
settings.replayDescription: Replay the welcome tour to revisit the platform introduction and tool overview.
settings.clearDescription: Clear locally cached drafts, guest demos, and workflow context to restart the guided flow.
settings.clearedNote: Local drafts and demo state were cleared.
settings.savedDescription: Authenticated results live in the workspace timeline. Review, favorite, pin, and delete saved runs there.
settings.diagnosticsDescription: Quick check for API reachability from the frontend client.
settings.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
